subject: Databricks — Take-home for Sr. Product Manager, Databricks AI
body:
Hi Jane,

Thanks for moving forward with us. As part of the Sr. PM, Databricks AI loop, please complete the attached take-home assessment.

Link: https://databricks.takehome.app/jane-doe-pm-2026
Deadline: 2026-06-03 (5 business days from receipt)
Estimated time: 4 hours

Please reply to confirm receipt and let us know if you need additional time.

Thanks,
Databricks Recruiting

asks: let us know if you need additional time

_expected._notes: 5-day deadline = not urgent. Bumping to `urgent` only triggers when ≤48h.
